message:
Section 34: Testing Patterns and Methodology

CASS research synthesis adding comprehensive testing patterns:
- Testing philosophy: "NO mocks - test real implementations"
- Test organization: JS/TS (Vitest/Jest/Bun), Go table-driven
- Fixtures: real filesystem with temp directories
- Property-based testing with proptest invariants
- Coverage analysis and gap identification
- Snapshot testing patterns
- E2E testing with Playwright
- BATS framework for shell testing
- Real clipboard testing (cross-platform)
- Test harness pattern (Go testutil.Harness)
- CI integration with JUnit output

Sources: brenner_bot, coding_agent_account_manager,
destructive_command_guard, jeffreysprompts.com

Closes bead: meta_skill-cbx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
